title: Project Report: Airflow + dbt Analytics Pipeline — Data Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Airflow DAG orchestrates dbt models on BigQuery/Snowflake with data quality tests.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Airflow + dbt Analytics Pipeline** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Data Engineer. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Airflow DAG orchestrates dbt models on BigQuery/Snowflake with data quality tests. Tools: Airflow, dbt, BigQuery/Snowflake.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Airflow DAG with task dependencies
Objective: dbt models with tests
Objective: Data quality checks
Objective: Slack alert on failure
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Data Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Data Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Data Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: dbt
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: dbt** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Staging + mart models. Complete these tasks: sources.yml; schema tests. Deliverable for this phase: dbt docs site.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] sources.yml
- [ ] schema tests
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase dbt is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### Where to use it

### Real use example

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: dbt project; Airflow DAG; dbt docs URL; Quality report. Skills demonstrated: Airflow, dbt, Data quality. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: dbt project
Deliverable: Airflow DAG
Deliverable: dbt docs URL
Deliverable: Quality report
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits dbt project and passes the rubric.
